cover.headline: See if you can retire comfortably.
cover.sub: Enter your assets, income, and expenses. Get a year-by-year picture of your financial future — including Age Pension.

benefits.heading: What you get
benefits.item1_desc: Watch your wealth grow (and draw down) year by year, so you know exactly when you can stop working.
benefits.item2_desc: The calculator finds the highest sustainable annual expense that keeps your money lasting until your target age.
benefits.item3_desc: Asset and income tests run every year of your projection, so your pension entitlement is always accurate.

steps.heading: How it works
steps.step1_desc: Your age, assets, income, and expenses — takes about two minutes.
steps.step2_desc: Year-by-year calculations including super, tax, inflation, and Age Pension.
steps.step3_desc: An interactive chart shows your net wealth trajectory at a glance.
steps.step4_desc: Adjust growth rates, retirement age, or expenses and re-run instantly.

cover.pension_callout: Includes automatic Age Pension calculations using current Australian Government asset and income test thresholds (Sept 2025 – Mar 2026).
cover.privacy_strip: Your data never leaves your browser — nothing is stored on our servers.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.a1: Yes. Everything is saved in your browser only. We never see or store your numbers.
faq.a2: Yes — it uses Australian tax brackets, superannuation rules, and Age Pension thresholds. It is not suitable for other countries.
faq.a3: They reflect current rules and your chosen assumptions. Real markets are unpredictable — treat results as a planning guide, not a guarantee.

final_cta.heading: Ready to see your number?
final_cta.sub: It's free, private, and takes two minutes.

cover.footer_disclaimer: This tool provides estimates only and is not financial advice. Always consult a qualified financial adviser before making retirement decisions.
cover.footer_opensource: Open source — view the source code on GitHub

form.privacy_notice: Your data is encrypted and stored locally on your device for privacy and security.

auto_optimize.help: When enabled, your annual expenses will be automatically calculated and adjusted based on your other inputs to ensure you reach exactly zero net worth at your target age. This maximizes your lifetime spending potential.
auto_optimize.label: Auto-calculated annual expense:

personal.homeowner_help: Homeowner status affects age pension asset test thresholds

assets.property_help: Real estate, land, and other property investments
assets.savings_help: Stocks, bonds, savings, and liquid investments
assets.wealth_formula: Net wealth = Assets - Mortgage + Superannuation + Savings

income.disposable_formula: Disposable income = Net salary after tax + Age pension + Rental income
income.expense_warning: Expense has been automatically adjusted to your maximum disposable income of {amount}
income.expense_error: Expenses cannot exceed disposable income of {amount}
income.auto_calculated: Auto-calculated based on your other inputs
income.paid_from_assets: Will be paid from financial assets only

advanced.rental_yield_help: Net rental return after fees and tax (Australian average: 3.3%)
advanced.savings_growth_help: Expected annual return on your investments
advanced.cpi_help: Consumer Price Index growth rate for expense escalation (default: 3%)
advanced.nps_years_help: Years contributed to National Pension so far. Under 10 years = no pension.
advanced.partner_nps_years_help: Partner's years contributed to National Pension so far

house.toggle: I plan to buy a house
house.purchase_info: At age {age} {amount} will be deducted from your savings as a down payment.

life_events.empty: Add lump sum events like buying a car, receiving an inheritance, home renovation, etc.
life_events.income_title: Income — click to switch to expense
life_events.expense_title: Expense — click to switch to income

summary.optimal_subtitle: Annual to reach zero at end
